body_excerpt: In ProtocolMiscBuilder::BuildSetLinkCapaReportCriteria of protocolmiscbuilder.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
